name: upload_asset
description: Upload a file or image asset to the DatoCMS media library. This is a two-step process: first request an upload URL, then create the upload record with metadata. Supports images (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG), documents (PDF), videos, and other file types. You can attach alt text, title, and custom metadata to uploaded assets.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path returned after uploading the file to the DatoCMS upload endpoint. Obtain this by first POSTing to /upload-requests to get a presigned URL, uploading the file there, then using the returned path here.

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: The author or copyright holder of the asset.

parameters.name: default_field_metadata
parameters.description: Localized metadata object containing 'alt' (alt text), 'title' (title text), and 'custom_data' (key-value pairs) for each locale.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Array of string tags to categorize the asset for easier searching and filtering.

en.alt: A scenic mountain landscape at sunset
en.title: Mountain Sunset

en.alt: A scenic mountain landscape at sunset
en.title: Mountain Sunset
